summary: Reference matrix for source or binary imports, project behavior, and artifact roundtrip contracts.

cases.upstream_intent: Imported roots should support stable member chains through explicit scope construction.
cases.zr_contract: Root imports may participate in member chains without special runtime fallbacks.
cases.expected_outcome: root module member chain compiles and executes
assertions: import resolution records the root module identity
member chain uses ordinary member lowering
project fixture returns the expected value

aot_c.skip_reason: project/runtime suites already prove native AOT C execution; this reference case keeps per-case executable parity disabled until the manifest runner can require executed_via=aot_c

aot_llvm.skip_reason: project/runtime suites already prove native AOT LLVM execution when the LLVM host toolchain is present; this reference case keeps per-case executable parity disabled until the manifest runner can require executed_via=aot_llvm

return: root module member chain compiles and executes

parity.skip_reason: native AOT parity is now covered by project/runtime suites; this reference case keeps AOT modes optional until per-case manifest-driven parity is wired

cases.upstream_intent: Source and binary loading should converge on one logical module identity.
cases.zr_contract: Source and binary forms of the same logical module share one canonical identity.
cases.expected_outcome: source and binary import forms resolve to the same logical module identity
assertions: module cache key is canonicalized
artifact metadata preserves the canonical path
runtime imported module identity matches across forms

cases.upstream_intent: Cyclic imports need deterministic behavior and dedicated diagnostics.
cases.zr_contract: ZR either rejects unsupported cycles or handles only the explicitly supported cycle forms with deterministic diagnostics.
cases.expected_outcome: unsupported cyclic import graph fails deterministically
assertions: diagnostic names the import cycle
runtime cache state remains valid after failure
stress re-run of the failing graph stays deterministic

cases.upstream_intent: Internal helper APIs should not leak into public import surfaces.
cases.zr_contract: Hidden internal import helpers are not public module members.
cases.expected_outcome: attempts to access hidden import helpers fail with visibility diagnostics

public export metadata omits the helper
artifact roundtrip preserves the hidden status

cases.upstream_intent: Reference languages disagree on implicit relative import rules.
cases.zr_contract: ZR does not invent implicit relative import resolution beyond its documented module path rules.
cases.expected_outcome: implicit relative import shortcuts are rejected or diagnosed explicitly
assertions: diagnostic names the unresolved import rule
project compile path does not guess a relative path
artifact omits guessed resolution metadata

cases.upstream_intent: Loaders that guess by module name or extension lead to unstable runtime behavior.
cases.zr_contract: ZR module loading does not use name-based runtime fallback branches after canonical path resolution.
cases.expected_outcome: loader does not guess alternative modules by name after canonical resolution fails
assertions: runtime error reports the unresolved canonical path
artifact records the requested path only
stress repeated failures stay deterministic
